creator: jhb@FreeBSD.org
text: I have a patch to do more sysctl-related cleanups after my previous round to remove the macros for names of statically numbered sysctls.  This removes the <foo>_MAXID constants that were used to know the bounds of aforementioned arrays.  It also removes some unused constants for sysctl nodes that are correctly using OID_AUTO.  Patch is at http://people.freebsd.org/~jhb/patches/sysctl_kill_maxid.patch and is relative to HEAD.  Thanks!
